content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 26, 2005

Wen Ling Chin
Security Analyst
San Francisco City and County
Employees’ Retirement System
Investment Division
30 Van Ness Avenue, Suite 3000
San Francisco, CA 94102

Re: Your Request for Withdrawal
Our File No. W-05-080

Dear Mr. Chin:

This letter is in response to your letter dated April 21, 2005. Your inquiry does not appear to present any questions concerning the application of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice, must be declined by this agency.

Should you need advice or assistance in the future regarding the application of provisions of the Act to your actions, please do not hesitate to resubmit your request to the Fair Political Practices Commission.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant Counsel, Legal Division

JW:rd
W:\AdviceLtrs\05-080

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
